claims.claim: Dustin Jacoby has surprising power despite not looking like a traditional power puncher.
claims.quote: People always forget that Dustin Jacoby's powerful because he doesn't look like a power puncher, but the dude has a ton of knockouts.

occurrences.quote: People always forget that Dustin Jacoby's powerful because he doesn't look like a power puncher, but the dude has a ton of knockouts.

claims.claim: Dustin Jacoby effectively transitions from stuffing takedowns immediately into striking combinations.
claims.quote: as soon as he stuffs a takedown, he goes right into striking which makes it really hard for people who want to continually shoot takedowns.

occurrences.quote: as soon as he stuffs a takedown, he goes right into striking which makes it really hard for people who want to continually shoot takedowns.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has a defensive flaw where he keeps his chin exposed while striking.
claims.quote: he does just kind of have his chin up there to be hit.

occurrences.quote: he does just kind of have his chin up there to be hit.

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has a significant grappling advantage over Santiago Ponzinibbio.
claims.quote: if he gets this fight to the mat, I I he has a big big time advantage over a guy like Ponzinibbio.

occurrences.quote: if he gets this fight to the mat, I I he has a big big time advantage over a guy like Ponzinibbio.

claims.claim: Santiago Ponzinibbio has not been the same fighter since suffering a major injury several years ago.
claims.quote: ever since Ponzi had that big injury like few years ago, more than a few years ago, quite a while ago, he never quite came back the same.

occurrences.quote: ever since Ponzi had that big injury like few years ago, more than a few years ago, quite a while ago, he never quite came back the same.

claims.claim: Mike Davis is the superior striker in his matchup against Nurullo Aliev.
claims.quote: He's definitely the better striker in this match up.

occurrences.quote: He's definitely the better striker in this match up.

claims.claim: Mike Davis has a tendency to throw high-impact kicks as opponents attempt to exit the pocket.
claims.quote: as his opponent tries to exit the pocket, that's when he throws a big kick

occurrences.quote: as his opponent tries to exit the pocket, that's when he throws a big kick

claims.claim: Nurullo Aliev's striking is primarily effective because his grappling threat forces opponents to respect his offense.
claims.quote: It's basically the grappling threat sets it up and it sets up his flurries.

occurrences.quote: It's basically the grappling threat sets it up and it sets up his flurries.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim has a tendency to mentally break during fights.
claims.quote: he's technically the better, more skilled fighter here. But he breaks.

occurrences.quote: he's technically the better, more skilled fighter here. But he breaks.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim has effective takedown defense and punishes opponents for failed attempts.
claims.quote: He's got good takedown defense and he makes opponents have to pay for those failed takedowns

occurrences.quote: He's got good takedown defense and he makes opponents have to pay for those failed takedowns

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim lacks mental fortitude and tends to break under adversity.
claims.quote: he just breaks. He doesn't have the dog in him

occurrences.quote: he just breaks. He doesn't have the dog in him

claims.claim: Valter Walker has poor striking defense.
claims.quote: Striking defense is bad.

occurrences.quote: Striking defense is bad.

claims.claim: Wellington Turman has a good cage push and can secure takedowns against the cage.
claims.quote: He's got a good cage push. He can get his takedowns up against the cage.

occurrences.quote: He's got a good cage push. He can get his takedowns up against the cage.

claims.claim: Islam Dulatov rushes in with a barrage of strikes sometimes.
claims.quote: he does rush in sometimes with a barrage.

occurrences.quote: he does rush in sometimes with a barrage.

claims.claim: Tyrell Fortune's best path to winning is his knee to the body.
claims.quote: He's got a good knee to the body. That knee to the body is probably his best path to winning.

occurrences.quote: He's got a good knee to the body. That knee to the body is probably his best path to winning.

claims.claim: Rizvan Kuniev has good takedown defense.
claims.quote: solid grappler though, good takedown defense

occurrences.quote: solid grappler though, good takedown defense

claims.claim: Bogdan Guskov is taking the fight against Magomed Ankalaev on short notice.
claims.quote: Guskov's taking this fight on I you know, probably week and a half, two weeks notice.

occurrences.quote: Guskov's taking this fight on I you know, probably week and a half, two weeks notice.

claims.claim: Bogdan Guskov lacks head movement.
claims.quote: he doesn't really have a bunch of head movement, so that could be a problem for him.

occurrences.quote: he doesn't really have a bunch of head movement, so that could be a problem for him.

claims.claim: Magomed Ankalaev can be too patient and is willing to win by landing minimal strikes.
claims.quote: he can be too patient though. He's willing to just win a fight however, even if it means not doing anything but landing a couple little pokes and prods.

occurrences.quote: he can be too patient though. He's willing to just win a fight however, even if it means not doing anything but landing a couple little pokes and prods.

claims.claim: Ismael Bonfim wilts and breaks when he is hit hard.
claims.quote: hit him hard, he's going to will. He breaks.

occurrences.quote: hit him hard, he's going to will. He breaks.

claims.claim: Axel Sola has a significant height and reach advantage over Ismael Bonfim.
claims.quote: He's got a nice height and reach advantage here. 6' tall versus 5'8. 74 inch reach 71 and a half.

occurrences.quote: He's got a nice height and reach advantage here. 6' tall versus 5'8. 74 inch reach 71 and a half.

claims.claim: Axel Sola possesses high durability and toughness.
claims.quote: Soul is just all dog toughness

occurrences.quote: Soul is just all dog toughness

claims.claim: Sam Patterson has a five-inch reach advantage and a three-inch height advantage over Santiago Ponzanibio.
claims.quote: Five inch reach advantage, three-inch height advantage

occurrences.quote: Five inch reach advantage, three-inch height advantage

claims.claim: Sam Patterson is nine years younger than Santiago Ponzanibio.
claims.quote: nine years younger.

occurrences.quote: nine years younger.

offCard.claim: Magomed Tuqayev leaves himself vulnerable by blitzing with his hands down and leading with his head.
offCard.quote: sometimes he does these blitzes where his hands are down here and he'll lead with the head and start throwing.

occurrences.quote: sometimes he does these blitzes where his hands are down here and he'll lead with the head and start throwing.

offCard.claim: Brenton Hibero is overly willing to accept bottom position while searching for low-percentage submissions.
offCard.quote: he's willing to accept the bottom for too long. It's frustrating cuz I know the guy has sweeps.

occurrences.quote: he's willing to accept the bottom for too long. It's frustrating cuz I know the guy has sweeps.

offCard.claim: Axel Solla uses leg attacks primarily to create space to return to his feet rather than to secure submissions.
offCard.quote: he often uses leg attacks to create space. Now, he's not getting these leg attacks, but he's threatening them enough that people have to at least acknowledge them

occurrences.quote: he often uses leg attacks to create space. Now, he's not getting these leg attacks, but he's threatening them enough that people have to at least acknowledge them

offCard.claim: Axel Solla possesses a high-quality, versatile jab.
offCard.quote: He's got a good long jab. Works it high. He works it low.

occurrences.quote: He's got a good long jab. Works it high. He works it low.

offCard.claim: Axel Solla has demonstrated high durability in previous fights.
offCard.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

occurrences.quote: Showed his durability, but you can only do so many of those in a career.

offCard.claim: Axel Solla uses leg attacks as a defensive tool to create space when taken down.
offCard.quote: he often uses leg attacks to create space.

occurrences.quote: he often uses leg attacks to create space.

offCard.claim: Thomas Peterson relies on a reckless striking style of tucking his chin and charging forward.
offCard.quote: he likes to just tuck his chin and charge in.

occurrences.quote: he likes to just tuck his chin and charge in.

offCard.claim: Thomas Peterson's most effective striking weapon is his dirty boxing.
offCard.quote: His dirty boxing is his best uh weapon on the feet.

occurrences.quote: His dirty boxing is his best uh weapon on the feet.

offCard.claim: Damian Rebesky fights out of both orthodox and southpaw stances.
offCard.quote: Fights out of either stance. We've seen him both orthodox and southpaw, no problem.

occurrences.quote: Fights out of either stance. We've seen him both orthodox and southpaw, no problem.

offCard.claim: Damian Rebesky has good takedown defense using his hips to sprawl.
offCard.quote: He's got good take down defense. Gets sprawl. Um uses, you know, uses like a strong like hip to block the uh the takedown.

occurrences.quote: He's got good take down defense. Gets sprawl. Um uses, you know, uses like a strong like hip to block the uh the takedown.

offCard.claim: Magomed Tulov has not fought a fighter currently on the UFC roster.
offCard.quote: he hasn't fought a guy that's actively in the UFC.

occurrences.quote: he hasn't fought a guy that's actively in the UFC.

offCard.claim: Magomed Tulov may have a weak chin.
offCard.quote: if Tulov's got a little bit of a glass chin, he is a little skinny with that neck.

occurrences.quote: if Tulov's got a little bit of a glass chin, he is a little skinny with that neck.

offCard.claim: Santiago Ponzanibio is coming off a 14-month layoff.
offCard.quote: Has not fought in a year and two months.

occurrences.quote: Has not fought in a year and two months.
